project_name: Lotte Chemical / H2 Green Hydrogen (South Korea)
status_detail: Large-scale green hydrogen project in South Korea by Lotte Chemical. 100 MW alkaline electrolysis import terminal. Partnering with European OEMs for technology supply. Targeting refinery and chemical industry offtake. Part of South Korea's Hydrogen Economy Roadmap.

data_management.narrative_summary: Lotte Chemical is developing a 100 MW green hydrogen project in South Korea as part of the country's Hydrogen Economy Roadmap, which targets 5.26 million fuel cell electric vehicles and 1,200 hydrogen refueling stations by 2040. The project will use alkaline electrolysis to produce green hydrogen for Lotte's refinery and chemical operations. South Korea is one of the most active hydrogen markets in Asia, with significant government support and strong industrial demand from the refining, chemicals, and electronics sectors.

offtake.offtaker_name: Lotte Chemical Ulsan refinery and chemical plants (captive use)

sources.title: Lotte Chemical green hydrogen project — South Korea hydrogen roadmap
